_meta.what: Wave 0 calibration set — 6 hand-scored reference entities spanning the rubrics (mythology-research-spec §6). Shipped VERBATIM in every fan-out prompt so parallel researchers score alike.
_meta.acceptance_rule: Wave-2/3 batches must score these within ±1 of the frozen values, else the batch is re-run, not hand-patched (spec §7).
_meta.spread: influence {1,1,1,2,4,5} · recognition {1,3,4,4,4,5} · depiction_risk {none×4, living×2} · table_tier {normal×3, vip×1, vvip×2}

entities.name: Zeus
entities.rating_notes: Extinct organized worship with strong cultural continuity = influence 2 (rubric anchor names Greek core figures); global household name = recognition 5. Modern Hellenist revival is tiny and imposes no depiction norms. CALIBRATION LESSON: fame alone does not buy VVIP — worship-wealth dominates table tier, so recognition-5 Zeus still lands VIP at influence 2.

entities.name: Ganesha
entities.rating_notes: Principal deity of a living major religion (>100M) = influence 5. Globally recognized image but short of Zeus/Thor household-name tier = recognition 4. LIVING gate: each on-screen patron appearance is owner-gated (precedent: real controversies over Hindu deities in games); safe default = off-screen investor whose boons arrive through intermediaries.

entities.name: Amaterasu
entities.rating_notes: Living significant practice (Shinto; Ise Grand Shrine) = influence 4, not 5 (adherence scale below the >100M majors). Games/anime staple (Okami, Naruto) = recognition 4. Living gate applies per §3.3.

entities.name: Väinämöinen
entities.rating_notes: No surviving worship; Kalevala continuity is literary-national, not cultic = influence 1. Known to mythology-curious audiences (rubric anchor names him) = recognition 3. CALIBRATION LESSON: national-epic fame without worship = a poor god on Normal tables — rare board appearances, collector appeal.

entities.name: Baba Yaga
entities.rating_notes: Folk-tale being, never an object of worship = influence 1 (folk class ceiling in practice). Known to anyone who's touched games/comics/movies (rubric anchor names her) = recognition 4. Not patron_capable; natural dealer / table_boss / event-NPC material — high recognition makes her strong content despite zero divine wealth.

entities.name: Zababa
entities.rating_notes: City god of Kish (war); extinct and remembered by specialists only = influence 1, recognition 1. CALIBRATION LESSON: the honest floor — mythic obscurity means rare boards and a collector's thrill when he bids (canon rule), not padding him up to seem interesting.
